17:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Install prerequisites Node.js or Bun ",["$","code",null,{"children":"curl -fsSL https://bun.sh/install | bash"}],". Optional: Setup shell with dev tools like nvim, fish, system info with ",["$","$Lc",null,{"href":"https://github.com/vtempest/Server-Shell-Setup","children":"Server-Shell-Setup"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Clone to localhost or server ",["$","code",null,{"children":"git clone https://github.com/vtempest/svelte-docs-starter"}],".",["$","br",null,{}],"\n","Optional: Press ",["$","code",null,{"children":"."}]," when on the Github repo page to fork and run in Github Workspaces."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["CD to project directory ",["$","code",null,{"children":"cd svelte-docs-starter"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Install dependencies ",["$","code",null,{"children":"bun install"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"mv .env.example .env ; mv wrangler.example.toml wrangler.toml"}]," and set the domain and API keys in ",["$","code",null,{"children":".env"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Auth providers, get id/secret from ",["$","$Lc",null,{"href":"https://console.cloud.google.com/apis/credentials","children":"Google"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Set OAuth origin ",["$","code",null,{"children":"http://localhost"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"http://localhost:5173"}]," on local or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"https://domain.com"}]," on server."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Set redirect ",["$","code",null,{"children":"http://localhost:5173/auth/oauth/google/callback"}]," or ",["$","code",null,{"children":"https://api.domain.com/auth/oauth/google/callback"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Optional: For email auth, get API from ",["$","$Lc",null,{"href":"https://resend.com/api-keys","children":"Resend"}]," mailer and verify domain."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Log in with your Cloudflare account by running: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"bunx wrangler login"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Create your D1 database via dashboard or with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"bunx wrangler d1 create serverless-docs-db"}]," or your custom db name."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Copy the console output database_name and database_id."}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Go to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"wrangler.toml"}]," and change ",["$","code",null,{"children":"database_name"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"database_id"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Go to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"drizzle.config.ts"}]," and change db name in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"dbName"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Go to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"package.json"}]," and change db name in ",["$","code",null,{"children":"db:push:*"}]," and ",["$","code",null,{"children":"db:backup:prod"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Generate and migrate the schema to dev or prod db: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"bun run db:migrate; bun run db:push:dev; bun run db:push:prod"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Develop on local with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"bun dev"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Deploy to prod with ",["$","code",null,{"children":"bun serve"}],"."]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Domain: ",["$","$Lc",null,{"href":"https://dash.cloudflare.com","children":"Cloudflare Dashboard"}]," -> Workers and Pages -> [your worker name] -> Settings"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["Add-to-Home on Mobile Web: Design logo and generate icons for with ",["$","$Lc",null,{"href":"https://github.com/elegantapp/pwa-asset-generator","children":"PWA Asset Generator"}]," or ",["$","$Lc",null,{"href":"https://favicon.io","children":"Favicon.io"}]]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["User Analytics: Get Google Analytics ID from
